zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain於1064年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-時，他的父親Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain33歲，母親Maud de Montgomery11061歲。他至少有1個兒子。他於1104年登記服兵役。他去世於1140年在英國英格蘭倫敦貝爾蒙享年76歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain was born in 1064, in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, was 33 and his mother, Maud de Montgomery, was 11061. He had at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1104. He died in 1140, in Bermondsey, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain est né en 1064, à Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maud de Montgomery, avait 11061 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1104. Il est décédé en 1140, à Bermondsey, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain 1064 in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain 33 und seine Mutter Maud de Montgomery 11061. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1104 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1140 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bermondsey, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain è nato il nel 1064 nel Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Montgomery, aveva 11061 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1104. Morì nel 1140, nel Bermondsey, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortainが1064年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェで生まれた時，父Robert de Conteville Count of Mortainは33歳，母Maud de Montgomeryは11061歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1104年に兵役登録をした。彼は1140年にイギリスイギリスロンドンバーモンドセイで76歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain(이)가 1064년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 모르타그니-오-퍼체에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Montgomery(은)는 11061세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1104년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 버몽시에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Bermondsey, London, England: Bermondsey, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain nasceu em 1064, em Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Montgomery, tinha 11061 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1104. Ele faleceu em 1140, em Bermondsey, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain родился в 1064 г. в местности мортагне-ау-пирч, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Montgomery, 11061. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1104 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1140 г. в местности бирмондси, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Mortain Earl of Cornwall, Count of Mortain nació en 1064, en Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Maud de Montgomery, tenía 11061 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1104. Murió en 1140, en Bermondsey, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
